name: Cheddar & Bacon
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup Shredded cheddar cheese, finely grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the yeast to a mixing bowl.
2. Mix in the bread flour until well combined.
3. Stir in the salt and sugar.
4. Gradually add the butter (divided) and milk, stirring continuously until a dough forms.
5. Knead the dough on a lightly floured surface for about 10 minutes or as directed by your machine's instructions.
6. Fold in the shredded cheddar cheese and crumbled bacon, mixing gently to distribute evenly throughout the dough.
